name: url
label: URL
help: Threads profile URL or @handle, e.g. https://threads.net/@username.

name: limit
label: Limit
help: Max items to return. Default 20, max 100. Billed per result.

name: cache
label: Cache
help: Responses are cached for 24 hours by default. Set false to bypass the cache and always fetch fresh data (default true).
